message:
feat(cx): add structured tracing, span management, and request correlation (bd-30pp)

Add Cx::trace_with_fields for structured key-value trace entries,
Cx::enter_span/SpanGuard for hierarchical span management with RAII
cleanup, and Cx::set_request_id/request_id for end-to-end request
correlation. Request IDs propagate through spans and appear in all
log entries via the DiagnosticContext.

Includes 5 integration tests covering structured fields, span
hierarchy, context restoration, and request ID propagation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
